General.Name: Endeavour Silver Corp.
General.Description: Endeavour Silver Corp., a silver mining company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, development, extraction, processing, refining, and reclamation of mineral properties in Mexico, Chile, Peru, and the United States. It primarily explores for gold and silver deposits, and precious metals, as well as polymetals. The company was formerly known as Endeavour Gold Corp. and changed its name to Endeavour Silver Corp. in September 2004. Endeavour Silver Corp. was incorporated in 1981 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
General.Address: 609 Granville Street, Vancouver, BC, Canada, V7Y 1G5
